title: Kryeit
description: Base modpack for the Kryeit server
body:
![Banner](https://kryeit.com/images/banner.png)

Welcome to the official page for the Kryeit modpack. This page will contain the needed mods to join the server, with some information alongside.

# Introduction

This modpack is aimed to be a foundation of your own modpack. You should add QoL mods and optimization mods to make your experience better.
You have an example modpack [here](https://modrinth.com/modpack/kryeit-enhanced)

**INFORMATION**
- This modpack has the needed mods + [REI](https://modrinth.com/mod/rei) and [AppleSkin](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin)
- It's an unconfigured modpack, only contains the mods

**Hotkeys**
- H: Opens the missions menu
